allow: PowerShell(dotnet build C:\\Repos\\Controls\\Controls\\Controls.csproj -c Release 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3; dotnet pack C:\\Repos\\Controls\\Controls\\Controls.csproj -c Release -o C:\\Repos\\Controls\\nupkg-audit --no-build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3)

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(60\); while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 5067 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { "listening on 5067"; break }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 })

PowerShell($p = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 5067 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1\).OwningProcess; if \($p\) { $tree = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessId -eq $p -or $_.ParentProcessId -eq $p }; Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.ParentProcessId -eq $p } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; \(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 5067 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) ? "still up" : "port 5067 free")
